title: Bride Surprises Groom With Her Own Song
transcript:
This groom is a ball of nerves waiting to see his bride.
Then the music starts to play.
Wait, that's not the traditional wedding march.
The voice fills the sanctuary all at once, it dawns on him.
And he can't keep it together - that's his wife's voice.
The doors open and there she is, escorted down the aisle to her own song.
Bride Ashton Gill Stout pulled off the perfect wedding surprise for her groom Cameron.
I was very very surprised and I think that's what really like... really got me in that moment was hearing her voice.
Uh... because I didn't expect it.
It was such a surreal moment, you know.
Two months before the big day, Ashton booked a recording studio and secretly recorded her favorite love song.
It's a promise I'm making to you.
I heard the song a long time ago and I just thought it was the most beautiful song, I thought the words were so pretty.
And I wanted to do something special for Cameron.
Ashton has a great voice - she was actually a contestant on season 17 of American Idol.
She didn't become the American Idol, but she's now going viral as the singing bride.
